---
title: "Regression"
author: "Sam Yu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(parameters)

dat_clean <- readRDS("../data/dat_clean.rds")


```


```{r}
# define DV
intention_items <- dat_clean %>%
  select(paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15))

alpha(intention_items)
omega(intention_items)

```

```{r}
# DV inspection
# visualisation prepare
intention_long <- dat_clean %>%
  select(paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "item",
    values_to = "score"
  )
```

```{r}
# histogram
ggplot(intention_long, aes(x = score)) +
  geom_bar() +
  facet_wrap(~ item, ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Intention Items",
    x = "Response",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# boxplot
ggplot(intention_long, aes(x = item, y = score)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Boxplot of Intention Items",
    x = "Item",
    y = "Score"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# zero order correlation 
# Define item sets
hope_items_4 <- c("hope_1", "hope_2", "hope_3", "hope_4")

action_items <- paste0("action_intentions_", 1:15)

# Create composites
dat_clean <- dat_clean %>%
  mutate(
    hope_composite_4 = rowMeans(
      select(., all_of(hope_items_4)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    intention_composite = rowMeans(
      select(., all_of(action_items)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )


# zero order correlation between hope composite and intention composite
cor_composites <- cor.test(
  dat_clean$hope_composite_4,
  dat_clean$intention_composite,
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

cor_composites

# zero order between hope items and intention items

cor_hope_action_items <- cor(
  dat_clean %>% select(all_of(hope_items_4)),
  dat_clean %>% select(all_of(action_items)),
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

cor_hope_action_items

# long format for visualisation
cor_hope_action_long <- as.data.frame(cor_hope_action_items) %>%
  rownames_to_column("hope_item") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -hope_item,
    names_to = "action_item",
    values_to = "correlation"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    correlation = round(correlation, 3)
  )

```

```{r}
# visualisation
# hope composite and intentions composite
ggplot(dat_clean, aes(x = hope_composite_4, y = intention_composite)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(
    x = "General hope composite",
    y = "Collective action intention composite",
    title = "Association between general hope and action intentions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


# Hope items and intentions items heatmap
cor_hope_action_long <- cor_hope_action_long %>%
  mutate(
    action_item_short = gsub("action_intentions_", "AI", action_item),
    hope_item_short = gsub("hope_", "H", hope_item)
  )

ggplot(cor_hope_action_long, aes(x = action_item_short, y = hope_item_short, fill = correlation)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = correlation), size = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Action intention items",
    y = "Hope items",
    fill = "r",
    title = "Item-level correlations between hope and action intentions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}

```



```{r}
# item level regression
# each item
model_h1 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_1, data = dat_clean)
model_h2 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_2, data = dat_clean)
model_h3 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_3, data = dat_clean)
model_h4 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_4, data = dat_clean)
model_h5 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_5, data = dat_clean)
model_h6 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_6, data = dat_clean)
model_h7 <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_7, data = dat_clean)

summary(model_h1)
summary(model_h2)
summary(model_h3)
summary(model_h4)
summary(model_h5)
summary(model_h6)
summary(model_h7)


# overall
model_all <- lm(intention_composite ~ hope_1 + hope_2 + hope_3 + hope_4 + hope_5 + hope_6 + hope_7,
                data = dat_clean)

summary(model_all)
```

# regression based on CFA (Hope composite)
```{r}
# H2 confirmatory regression
h2_model <- lm(
  intention_composite ~ hope_composite_4,
  data = dat_clean
)

summary(h2_model)

# # stats extraction
# h2_result_table <- tidy(h2_model, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
#   filter(term == "hope_composite_4") %>%
#   mutate(
#     Predictor = "General hope",
#     B = round(estimate, 3),
#     SE = round(std.error, 3),
#     t = round(statistic, 3),
#     p = round(p.value, 3),
#     CI_95 = paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
#   ) %>%
#   select(Predictor, B, SE, t, p, CI_95)
# 
# h2_fit_table <- glance(h2_model) %>%
#   mutate(
#     N = nobs(h2_model),
#     R2 = round(r.squared, 3),
#     adj_R2 = round(adj.r.squared, 3),
#     F = round(statistic, 3),
#     p_model = round(p.value, 3)
#   ) %>%
#   select(N, R2, adj_R2, F, p_model, df, df.residual)
# 
# h2_result_table
# h2_fit_table
```
















# regressiion based on EFA (Hope 3 factors)
```{r}
# regression based on EFA
efa3 <- fa(hope_items, nfactors = 3, rotate = "oblimin", fm = "ml", scores = "regression")

# Generating factor scores into the original dataframe
hope_factor_scores <- as.data.frame(efa3$scores)

dat_clean <- dat_clean %>%
  bind_cols(hope_factor_scores)


# renaming hope factors 
dat_clean <- dat_clean %>%
  rename(
    Not_Hope = ML1,
    Goal_Hope = ML2,
    Action_Hope = ML3
  )
```

```{r}
# predicting action intention

model_hope3 <- lm(
  intention_composite ~ Not_Hope + Goal_Hope + Action_Hope,
  data = dat_clean
)

summary(model_hope3)
```
